description: 'shero' is the dark span between dusk and dawn. It can name the environment of darkness or one portion of the daily cycle; sleep, work, travel, ceremony, and wakefulness are separate matters that may occur within it.
articulatory_notes: Raise the tongue blade toward the postalveolar area for unvoiced 'sh' and send air through its central groove into stressed middle-height front 'e'. Tap or briefly trill the tongue at the alveolar ridge, then draw it back and round into middle-height 'o'.

semantic_domains.nature: the recurring span of darkness between dusk and dawn
semantic_domains.temporal: the dark portion of the daily cycle
